task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the duplicate processing text file to retrieve the Case IDs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of '~/Documents/duplicate_processing.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Master Case record in the application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application UI displaying the Master Case, identifiable by the title 'Construction noise violation at 7am - Master Record'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Note was added to the Master Case containing the description from the Duplicate Case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A note entry visible within the Master Case record that contains the text from the duplicate case (look specifically for the key phrase 'jackhammering' in the note body).

task_completion.description: Verify a relationship or association was established between the two case records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Relationships', 'Associations', or 'Linked Cases' section in the Master Case UI showing a link to the Duplicate Case (identifiable by its title 'Noise Complaint - Jackhammering' or its Case ID).

task_completion.description: Verify the Duplicate Case was set to a 'Closed' status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application UI displaying the Duplicate Case ('Noise Complaint - Jackhammering') with its status indicator or field clearly showing 'Closed' or 'Close'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the graphical user interface of the case management system to perform the consolidation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with web browser UI elements (buttons, forms, tabs) rather than terminal windows executing API/curl commands to update the cases.

integrity.description: Ensure the relationship between cases was created using the proper system feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The association should appear in a dedicated structural UI element for linked records, not just typed manually into a generic text field or comment box.

integrity.description: Ensure the status change and notes are genuine application states.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Closed' status and notes should appear in standard application styling without browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open or visible signs of DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Master Case title is exactly 'Construction noise violation at 7am - Master Record'. The Duplicate Case title is exactly 'Noise Complaint - Jackhammering'. The duplicate case description contains the key phrase 'jackhammering', which must be present in the note added to the Master Case. The required final status for the duplicate case must contain the substring 'CLOSE' (e.g., 'CLOSED').
